task_completion.description: Verify that the MRHead sample data has been loaded into the scene.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 3D Slicer interface shows 'MRHead' in the Data module list, or the slice views display a standard MRI head scan.

task_completion.description: Verify that a segmentation has been created and thresholding applied to select brain tissue.
task_completion.visual_evidence: The Segment Editor module is open. A colored overlay (segmentation) covers the brain tissue area in the slice views, indicating the Threshold effect was used.

task_completion.description: Verify that the 'Mask volume' effect is selected and configured.
task_completion.visual_evidence: In the Segment Editor, the 'Mask volume' effect is highlighted or its options are visible. Parameters should show 'Fill outside' or 'Fill inside' (depending on logic, usually Fill outside to keep brain) and the input volume set to MRHead.

task_completion.description: Verify that the new masked volume 'MRHead_brain_only' has been generated.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A new volume named 'MRHead_brain_only' appears in the Data module/Subject Hierarchy, OR the slice views show the brain with the skull/background removed (blacked out).

task_completion.description: Verify that the masked volume is being saved to the specified export path.
task_completion.visual_evidence: A 'Save' or 'Export' dialog is visible showing the filename 'MRHead_brain_only.nrrd' and the destination folder '~/Documents/SlicerData/Exports/'.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent used the GUI rather than scripting the entire process via the Python Console.
integrity.visual_evidence: The Python Interactor/Console should not be the primary focus with a script executing the segmentation and masking logic.

integrity.description: Verify that the agent is interacting with the Slicer application window, not an external system terminal.
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show the Slicer GUI, not a command prompt or terminal window executing Slicer commands.

integrity.description: Verify that the workflow involves standard GUI elements (buttons, dropdowns).
integrity.visual_evidence: Mouse cursor or focus highlights appear on Slicer module panels (Segment Editor, Data) rather than just text editing or file system manipulation.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Input volume MRHead dimensions: 256x256x130. Expected output filename: MRHead_brain_only.nrrd.
